importantNote: Ready White is an AI-native standardized property-turnover operating system. Store the Private Integration Token in GHL_PRIVATE_INTEGRATION_TOKEN; do not commit the real token.

standardizedPackages.name: Basic Turn White
standardizedPackages.positioning: Light-prep rerent white repaint for entry-level turnover work
standardizedPackages.pricingModel: preset package buy rate with standard size bands

standardizedPackages.name: Standard Market Ready
standardizedPackages.positioning: Moderate-prep core offer for clean market presentation
standardizedPackages.pricingModel: preset package buy rate with standard add-ons

standardizedPackages.name: Premium Listing Ready
standardizedPackages.positioning: Enhanced prep and finish quality for higher-end resale presentation
standardizedPackages.pricingModel: preset package buy rate with listing-ready add-ons

standardizedPackages.name: Heavy Turn Reset
standardizedPackages.positioning: Damage-heavy and high-prep exception lane requiring scope verification
standardizedPackages.pricingModel: exception escalation workflow; hourly/change-order rates only for approved severe prep or custom repairs

required: 1 photo of the worst wall in each room

workflowActions.name: Create or update contact
workflowActions.notes: Map firstName, email, phone, propertyAddress, propertyType, occupiedStatus, desiredTimeline, packageInterest, notes, photoFileNames, and operational tags from the website payload.

workflowActions.name: Create opportunity
workflowActions.notes: Place the opportunity in Ready White Customer Jobs at New Lead when pipeline environment variables are configured.

workflowActions.name: Photos requested
workflowActions.message: Please upload 1 wide photo of each room and 1 photo of the worst wall in each room so we can verify scope quickly.

workflowActions.name: Photos received
workflowActions.message: Photos received. Scope review is in progress.

workflowActions.name: Quote sent
workflowActions.message: Package fit confirmed. Your Ready White quote is ready for review.

workflowActions.name: Vendor assignment
workflowActions.message: Your refresh is moving into vendor assignment. Scheduling details will follow.

workflowActions.name: Photo proof review
workflowActions.message: Completion photos are under review before the job is marked complete.

workflowActions.name: Review requested
workflowActions.message: Your Ready White refresh is complete. We would appreciate a quick review of the experience.

workflowActions.name: Send internal notification
workflowActions.notes: Notify the operations team with property details, occupancy status, desired timeline, package interest, notes, and submitted photo file names.

workflowActions.name: Speed to lead
workflowActions.notes: Send customer SMS/email and internal notification within 5 minutes to protect close rate.

workflowActions.name: Missed call text back
workflowActions.notes: Reply immediately with address, timeline, package lane, and required photo intake instructions.

workflowActions.name: Stale lead recovery
workflowActions.trigger: No required photos or approval after follow-up SLA
workflowActions.notes: Recover unsubmitted photos and quote approvals at day 1, day 3, and day 7 before closing the review.

workflowActions.name: Stage movement guardrails
workflowActions.notes: Apply deterministic tags, customer messaging, internal notifications, and next-step tasks for each standardized stage.

workflowActions.name: Property manager nurture
workflowActions.trigger: Closed Won or Completed property-management job
workflowActions.notes: Route recurring PM contacts into repeat-turn follow-up and next-vacancy outreach.

workflowActions.name: Review flywheel
workflowActions.trigger: Completed job with accepted photo proof
workflowActions.notes: Request a review and notify operations to capture reusable proof for recurring relationship sales.

checks: npm run smoke:ghl when READYWHITE_BASE_URL is set
npm run report:ghl when GHL credentials are set
